_comment: CANONICAL — server overwrites model output for this block if present on disk. Keep short: edit models dilute long realism lists.
skin_realism: visible pores on nose forehead cheeks, uneven tone with redness around nostrils and on elbows, fine vellus hair on cheeks catching light, natural oil sheen on T-zone only, faint under-eye shadows and fine lines, dry patches on lips with gloss only at center, subtle skin creases at neck armpit or belly when posing
eye_realism: natural catchlights, detailed iris, moist eyes, slight redness in corners, candid micro-expression, mild facial asymmetry
hair_realism: loose flyaways and breakage catching light, individual strand separation, slight frizz, realistic hair shine not CGI gloss
fabric_realism: visible weave, wrinkles, creases, lint, casual fabric drape
environment_realism: lived-in clutter, wall texture readable, dust in light beams, incidental background not art-directed
photo_realism: shot on smartphone main camera ~24mm f/1.8, deep depth of field with background details sharp, mild ISO luminance noise especially in shadows, slight chromatic aberration at edges, mild handshake tilt, imperfect autofocus, clipped highlight on forehead or nose when lit hard, JPEG compression softness, uncentered candid crop
color_grading: mixed white balance when plausible (warm lamp + cool window), colour spill from walls or clothes onto skin, natural unedited colors — no Instagram filter
capture_authenticity: reads as a real camera-roll snapshot — candid, unretouched, amateur
capture_triggers_phone: arm's-length or friend-shot phone energy, available light only unless flash fits the scene, never studio glamour or catalog polish
character_rendering: preserve identity-reference facial proportions and micro-asymmetry; no beauty-filter morphology, no enlarged eyes or V-line jaw slimming unless USER asks
imperfection_level: ordinary physical sensor capture — shadow noise and small flaws present, never sterile CGI clarity
